task-auth-001.description: Create IAuthService interface and auth types
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts exports IAuthService interface with signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods
types.ts exports AuthUser type with id, email, emailVerified, createdAt fields
types.ts exports AuthSession type with accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt, user fields
types.ts exports AuthCredentials type with email, password fields
types.ts exports AuthError type with code, message fields
Interface has NO runtime imports - pure type definitions only
onAuthStateChange returns unsubscribe function for cleanup

task-auth-002.description: Extend IEnvironment with auth service slot
acceptanceCriteria: IEnvironment.services includes optional auth?: IAuthService property
Import uses 'import type' to avoid runtime dependency
Existing persistence service remains required
JSDoc documents auth service purpose and optional nature
MockAuthService implements full IAuthService interface
Uses in-memory Map for user storage
signUp creates user, returns session with generated tokens
signIn validates credentials against stored users, returns session
signOut clears current session
getSession returns current session or null
onAuthStateChange notifies subscribers on auth state changes
clear() method resets all state for test isolation
Configurable delays via constructor options for async testing
Throws appropriate AuthError for invalid credentials
SupabaseAuthService implements full IAuthService interface
Constructor accepts Supabase client instance
signUp calls supabase.auth.signUp with email/password
signIn calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession calls supabase.auth.getSession
onAuthStateChange wraps supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange
Maps Supabase types to IAuthService types (AuthUser, AuthSession)
Converts Supabase errors to AuthError format
Handles null session gracefully

task-auth-005.description: Create auth domain store with enhancement hooks
acceptanceCriteria: domain.ts exports AuthDomain ArkType scope with AuthUser and AuthSession entities
AuthUser entity: id (string.uuid), email (string), emailVerified (boolean?), createdAt (string?)
AuthSession entity: id (string.uuid), userId (AuthUser reference), accessToken (string), refreshToken (string?), expiresAt (string)
domain.ts exports createAuthStore() factory using createStoreFromScope
enhanceModels adds AuthSession.isExpired computed view (compares expiresAt to now)
enhanceCollections adds basic collection access (required even if minimal)
enhanceRootStore adds volatile state: authStatus (idle|loading|error), authError (string|null)
enhanceRootStore adds views: currentUser, currentSession, isAuthenticated
enhanceRootStore adds actions: signUp, signIn, signOut that coordinate with IAuthService via getEnv()
enhanceRootStore adds initialize action to restore session on startup
Actions update volatile authStatus during operations
Actions sync IAuthService results to AuthUser/AuthSession collections
signOut clears both collections and resets volatile state

task-auth-006.description: Create auth module index with exports
acceptanceCriteria: index.ts re-exports all types from types.ts
index.ts re-exports MockAuthService from mock.ts
index.ts re-exports SupabaseAuthService from supabase.ts
index.ts re-exports AuthDomain and createAuthStore from domain.ts
Exports are organized: types first, then services, then domain

task-auth-007.description: Create AuthContext and useAuth hook for React
acceptanceCriteria: AuthContext.tsx exports AuthProvider component
AuthProvider accepts authService prop (IAuthService)
AuthProvider creates auth store with useRef for stability
AuthProvider subscribes to authService.onAuthStateChange in useEffect
AuthProvider cleans up subscription on unmount
useAuth hook returns auth store instance
useAuth throws if used outside AuthProvider
Store actions (signUp, signIn, signOut) are callable from hook
Store views (currentUser, isAuthenticated, authStatus) are observable
AuthDemoPage demonstrates complete auth flow with real Supabase
Page shows signup form with email/password fields
Page shows login form with email/password fields
Page shows logout button when authenticated
Page displays current user info when authenticated
Page shows loading state during auth operations
Page displays error messages on auth failures
Page uses real SupabaseAuthService (not mock)
Accessible at /auth-demo route
App.tsx updated with route
